context: Verify that the agent detects a blocked/rate-limited response, retries exactly once, stops after the second failure, and offers the semantic-scholar MCP as a fallback — without looping.

checklist.name: Block condition is detected and reported
checklist.description: The agent identifies that the response body is unusually short or empty and explicitly reports a potential CAPTCHA or rate-limit block to the user.

checklist.name: Exactly one retry is performed after a delay
checklist.description: The agent retries the search exactly once, with at least a short delay (recommended: 60 seconds or more). It does not retry immediately without delay.

checklist.name: No retry loop
checklist.description: The agent does not retry more than once. After the second attempt fails, it stops and does not continue retrying.

checklist.name: semantic-scholar MCP is offered as fallback
checklist.description: The agent informs the user that a semantic-scholar MCP server can be configured as a more reliable alternative, and provides or references the MCP config.

checklist.name: Block is documented honestly
checklist.description: The agent does not claim the query returned zero results. It explicitly states that the search could not be completed due to a block.
